Class PathfinderMoveTowardsTarget

java.lang.Object
me.gamercoder215.mobchip.ai.goal.Pathfinder
me.gamercoder215.mobchip.ai.goal.PathfinderMoveTowardsTarget
All Implemented Interfaces:
PathfinderInfo, Ranged, SpeedModifier
public final class PathfinderMoveTowardsTarget extends Pathfinder implements SpeedModifier, Ranged
Represents a Pathfinder for a Creature to move towards its target

      speedMod - Speed Modifier while moving

      c - Creature to use
      speedMod - Speed Modifier while moving
      range - Range to look for target

    • getInternalName

      public String getInternalName()
      Description copied from interface: PathfinderInfo
      Returns the pathfinder's internal name. This may match the actual NMS name of the pathfinder, but it may not.
